name: Glazed Cheesecake Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES:
4 ounces chocolate chunks (cut into pieces)
3 tablespoons margarine
1/2 cup sugar
1 teaspoon vanilla extract
2 large eggs
1/2 cup flour
1/2 teaspoon baking powder
1/4 teaspoon salt
GLAZE:
1 ounce chocolate chunks (cut into pieces)
2 teaspoons margarine
Oven: 350°F
Grease and flour a 9-inch square pan.
TOPPING:
In a small bowl, combine all topping ingredients; blend well. Set aside.
BROWNIES:
In a medium saucepan, melt chocolate and margarine over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Remove from heat and cool. Add sugar and vanilla; blend well.
Beat in eggs one at a time, blending well after each addition.
Add flour, baking powder, and salt to chocolate mixture; stir just until blended.
Pour into pan. Pour topping over batter.
Bake 40 to 50 minutes or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack.
GLAZE:
In a small saucepan, melt glaze ingredients over low heat until smooth, stirring constantly. Drizzle over brownies. Refrigerate at least 4 hours before cutting into bars and storing in the refrigerator.
